title: Poa borreri
intro: Poa borreri, also known as Borrer's meadow-grass, is a species of grass in the genus Poa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as potential use in treating gastrointestinal issues and fever. The bioactive constituents of Poa borreri include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. In herbal medicine, Poa borreri is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in traditional formulations for its purported health benefits.
